name: Seasoned Spinach (Korean)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove roots from spinach, if desired.
2. In a bowl, combine soy sauce, sugar, crushed sesame seeds, sesame oil, and minced scallion. Add vinegar if using.
3. Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to boil. Add spinach root ends first, then leaves, and cook until the leaves turn bright green.
4. Drain spinach immediately in cold water. Remove excess moisture by draining and squeezing out as much water as possible.
5. Place spinach in the bowl with the soy sauce mixture and toss well.
6. Serve at once, topped with a few red pepper threads if desired.
Serves 2.
